creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-04-27 08:18:42 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils/qpxtool     Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/qpxtool/files patch-qpxtool-gui-Makefile 
  Log:
  - Add MANCOMPRESSED=no
  - Fix library path order so [older] qpxtool libraries
    under /usr/local/lib don't get erroneously linked during
    port updating
  
  PR:             122637
  Submitted by:   Dmitry Marakasov <amdmi3@amdmi3.ru> (maintainer)
  Reported by:    bms
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.8       +2 -0      ports/sysutils/qpxtool/Makefile
